reviews.comment:
Esta hermoso la estación, cambiaron de dueños y ahora esta muy bien equipado con muchos productos alimenticios y la atención es excelente !!! Felicitaciones

(Translated by Google)
This station is beautiful! It's under new ownership and is now very well-stocked with a wide variety of food products, and the service is excellent! Congratulations!

reviews.comment:
Lugar muy tranquilo para pasar el día, el recreo posee juegos para niños algo descuidados, mesas bancos y fogones con parrilla, piletones para lavar y una ducha para refrescarse en verano. La calle de acceso se embarra después de las lluvias, pues no posee un mejorado adecuado, los baños de hombres y mujeres están algo descuidados, pero funcionan y siempre hay papel higiénico y toallitas para manos.

(Translated by Google)
A very peaceful place to spend the day. The recreation area has somewhat neglected children's play equipment, tables, benches, and fire pits with grills, sinks for washing up, and a shower for cooling off in the summer. The access road gets muddy after rain because it hasn't been properly improved. The men's and women's restrooms are a bit run down, but they work, and there's always toilet paper and hand towels available.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRNjZmd2VnEAE
